identity: A Veil-corrupted herald — humanoid silhouette, gaunt and unnaturally tall (approximately 7 feet) with elongated limbs. Charcoal-black skin that fades into wisps of shadow and torn shadow-tendrils trailing from the shoulders, elbows, and lower back. The face is hidden in deep shadow beneath a tattered cowl, with two GLOWING RED-VIOLET EYES burning where a face would be — the eyes are the critical identifier, like twin coals of unholy magenta light with a faint trail of violet smoke. Skeletal long-fingered hands with claw-like nails. No visible mouth or nose — only the burning eyes.
outfit: Ragged dark robes in deep charcoal and bruise-purple, hem in tattered ribbons that drift as if suspended in low gravity. A shredded high-collared cowl forms a hood over the head, with dark fabric strips hanging down across the chest. Bone-clasps at the shoulders. No metal armor. Cloth surfaces seem to bleed thin tendrils of violet-black mist.
weapons: No held weapon. The herald conjures shadow-magic — a swirling orb of red-violet flame between its claws when attacking; tendrils of shadow lash from the open palms.
attackStyle: East-facing profile. Right arm thrust forward, claw-fingers splayed, a ribbon of violet-black shadow lashing forward from the open palm toward the target. Left arm pulled back near the hip, claw curled. Robe hem swirls violently; shadow-tendrils trail from the shoulder. CRITICAL: character must be MID-STRIKE, clearly in motion. Eye-glow brighter than idle.
spellStyle: East-facing profile. Both hands raised at chest height, palms facing each other, conjuring a swirling orb of red-violet flame and shadow between them. Cowl tilted slightly back; eye-glow at maximum intensity, twin beams of violet light visible where eyes would be. Robe tendrils float upward in a halo around the body.
blockStyle: East-facing profile. Both forearms crossed in front of the chest, claw-fingers splayed outward, a translucent ward of violet-black mist forming between the arms. Body hunched forward, cowl tilted down so only the burning eyes are visible.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped forward on its knees, both arms hanging limp on the ground in front. Cowl fallen forward over the head, eye-glow dimmed to faint smoldering ember-red. Robe pooled and tattered around the body. Shadow-tendrils drooping, no longer animated.
southStyle: Facing the camera (south), full body, gaunt humanoid silhouette in tattered hooded robe. Arms loose at the sides, claw-hands visible. Cowl pulled fully over the head; deep shadow inside the hood with only TWO RED-VIOLET GLOWING EYES visible. Shadow-tendrils trailing from shoulders and elbows.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, slightly off-camera three-quarter view. Cowl pulled fully over the head, face entirely in deep shadow except for TWO BURNING RED-VIOLET EYES front and center. Tattered collar in dark charcoal and bruise-purple. Shadow-tendrils visible trailing from the shoulders. Menacing otherworldly presence.
